description: Color event photograph. A woman with long hair, glasses, and a dark blazer (USCIS Deputy Director Jennifer Higgins, per the tweet) stands at a wooden lectern with microphones, right hand raised, administering the oath of allegiance. She stands in front of a blue step-and-repeat media backdrop tiled with the repeated logo 'GEORGE WASHINGTON'S MOUNT * VERNON'; a red theater curtain is at right. In the foreground, seen from behind, are several new citizens in U.S. military dress uniforms (a Marine in dress blues with red trim at lower left, a Navy sailor in dress blues at lower right) with right hands raised. The repeated 'Mount Vernon' wording is venue branding on the backdrop. The image is a natural-light color event photograph with no graphic overlay. Per the tweet, this is a Presidents Day naturalization ceremony at George Washington's Mount Vernon for 30 new citizens.
notable_text: GEORGE WASHINGTON'S MOUNT * VERNON (repeated venue backdrop branding)
